summary: Remove 7 anomalous agent .md files from opencode-config/agents/ that were erroneously created during Wave 8-10 skill activation. These files caused phantom agent options (thinker, playwright-browser, memory-keeper, code-searcher, codebase-auditor, distill-compressor, researcher) to appear in the opencode interface. Agent definitions are managed by oh-my-opencode plugin, not on-disk markdown. Updated 2 test files that asserted agent file existence.
